entries.title: Overview of Varn
entries.body:
Solveyra is an aquatic nation on the planet Velundra, within the Varn star system.

Velundra is an ocean world, with it's mass being 40% water, it orbits a red dwarf with an orbital period of 30 days. Velundra's size is large, with it being 9 times the size of earth (See K2-18b for a more accurate description)

Varn is a red dwarf star with 5 orbiting bodies, Velundra, the only planet within it's habitable zone, Val-86, a gas giant, roughly the size of Jupiter, Nar-54 and Nar-55, 2 rocky moon planets orbiting close to Varn, and Gar-84, an ice planet furthest from Varn.

Velundra itself has 2 moons, Mar, and Var, these moons are rather large at twice the size of Earth's moon, although their effect on the planet is limited due to the lack of land masses on the surface.

entries.title: Solveyra Overview
entries.body:
Solveyra itself is a nation that is largely unadvanced in the forms of interstellar travel, with FTL only recently being invented, however they have undergone quite a few large scale engineering projects, such as their dyson swarm with allows them to have an easy access to energy from Varn, the energy collected is then sent back and harvested by one of the few above water structures built by Solveyra, those being large energy collection towers with 90% of their actual structure being underwater in order to send the energy back to civilization.

The bulk of Solveyra is underwater, with their cities design being that similar to Eclipse punk (Search it up, I ain't explaining it), with the nation itself being ran by a democratically elected council and stretching deep into the abyss of Velundra.

Solveyra's tech itself is rather limited, as stated before FTL was only recently invented, however where they specialize is energy, primarily due to kinetics being rather difficult to use due to the water and low gravity of the planet, with most of their machinery, weaponry, and day to day life being aided significantly by the use of powerful focused beams of energy powered by their star.

However Solveyra lacks a standing military, due to their history being one of peace they never saw reason to create one, with the closest one being a standard police force that's mostly demilitarized, and they see no reason to build a military either due to the thinking that the universe is, empty.

Solveyra's population is 80 billion.

entries.title: Overview of Solveyra's Government
entries.body:
Solveyra is ruled by a democratically elected council housed within the deepest parts of the nation, they are the primary body that makes decisions for the nation, wherever it be economic, military or scientific they are the ones who call the shots.

The council itself is that of 8 members, with none of them being specified to a specific group of actions, they all make decisions on everything, this does come at the cost of decisions being rather slow, especially due to the system of a decision needing to be written, proposed, voted and then passed, but it comes at the great benefit of corruption and bribery being near 0.

Elections occur every 10 years, or for Solveyra, every 1 year, with a year being market by an election cycle, however it isn't the typical election with politicians, instead random civilians are selected, voted on by their fellow citizens and 8 are picked out from a selection that can include millions, the entire voting process can take years all together.

entries.title: Velundra
entries.body:
Velundra is a large ocean world, or a Hycean (bigger then earth, smaller then neptune), it's atmosphere is incredibly rich in hydrogen, taking up 70% of it, with 20% being oxygen and the remaining 10% being varied gases.

The planet itself is inspired by K-18B, with it's size and general environment being the same, however what makes it different is life (duh).

Velundra's oceans are around 1000km deep and are arranged in a sort of 'tier' system, that being the Surface, Deep, and Abyss

The Surface, ranging from the surface (duh) down to around 300km, is where a large % of life comes from, spare for the Velnorca.

The deep ranged from 300km to 700km, it is the largest 'layer' and where Velnorca originally came from.

The Abyss itself ranges from 700km to the bottom, its the most dangerous part due to the shear pressure but it's also the richest part, containing crystals vital to Solveyra's energy technology.

Velundra has no solid surface, the entire planet is liquid, with it's mass being 40% ocean, it's gravity is around 1.2gs of force.
